extraction.one_line_summary: DAINESE Alberto won chaotic sprint after late crash eliminated GROVES Kaden and dispersed leadout trains with 200m remaining.
tactical_patterns: POGACAR Filippo launched lead-out sprint too early without dominant train, faded in final 50m despite holding second wheel.
Intermediate sprint 20km from finish designated critical for GC bonuses, revealing organizers expected tactical racing before flat finish.
ROGLIC Primoz verbally confirmed team hierarchy agreement prevents attacks after final mountain summit, only on climbs could he race freely.
DSM mixed into rival leadout causing shoulder contact crash at 200m, no single team controlled final kilometer positioning.

rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: perfectly timed wheel selection in disorganized sprint, won from chaos without traditional leadout
rider_signals.POGACAR Filippo: negative: misjudged sprint launch distance from second wheel, unable to hold off late surges despite strong position
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: caught in leadout crash 200m out, uninjured but denied sprint opportunity on ideal flat finish
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: explicitly stated internal thoughts conflict with team orders, will not attack KUSS Sepp after summit finishes
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: secured 17-second GC lead with teammate protection now formalized through verbal agreement limiting ROGLIC attacks
